caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, spiky grey wig and glasses is seen recording a podcast in a room filled with framed photos and clothing on racks. He wears a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and beige suspenders, and he has black headphones over his ears. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. To his right and left, red and white logos featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appear as overlays. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar posture, speaking into the microphone with his mouth slightly open, though his facial expression and head tilt shift subtly as he talks. The background remains static, showing various framed images and a "LEE" label on the clothing racks, maintaining a consistent studio environment throughout the clip.
